title: Deployment — Streamlit Application
summary: Built and deployed an interactive Streamlit application for AFib detection with real-time signal processing and explainability features.
completed_tasks: Built Streamlit app integrating the best-performing model from Week 7
Implemented full preprocessing pipeline inside the app (bandpass filter, resample to 128 Hz, normalize, 30s windows)
Added live ECG signal input support
Displayed AFib probability (%) as primary output
Integrated SHAP-based explainability visualization for model interpretability
Deployed application on Streamlit Community Cloud
app_features: ECG signal upload or live stream input
